VeloSSH

Lightweight TUI SSH Manager · Dual-Pane SFTP Transfer · Single Binary

[a/e/c/d] Add/Edit/Clone/Delete | [q] Quit
Download Release GitHub Read Docs

TUI

MIT
License

/ Features

Industrial-Grade SSH Toolkit

From server management to file transfers, from interactive shells to cross-machine streaming — VeloSSH arms your terminal to the teeth.

Server Management

Environment grouping, search & filter, async online detection with latency. Supports password, SSH key, and passphrase auth. System Keyring integration keeps credentials secure.

Dual-Pane File Manager

Local ↔ Remote split view. Batch upload/download with drag-and-drop. Inline rename, hash verification, text-level diff comparison.

SFTP Transfer Engine

Concurrent multi-threaded transfers. Multi-part parallel upload with resume for large files. Atomic overwrite protection. Cross-server direct transfer without touching local disk.

SSH Interactive Shell

Native shell sessions with PTY resize support. Local escape commands (`:vssh files`, etc.) let you switch panels from inside the shell with zero overhead.

Config Backup & Restore

vssh export / vssh import one-click config backup. AES-256-GCM encryption support for secure credential transfer.

Auto-Update & i18n

Built-in update checker with automatic download & install. Supports English / Simplified Chinese. Multiple themes and KeepAlive heartbeat.

/ Commands

One Line, Full Control

VeloSSH provides rich CLI subcommands — from TUI to quick connections, covering every workflow.

$vsshLaunch TUI
$vssh connect <server>Connect to shell
$vssh configOpen settings
$vssh copy <A>:<p> <B>:<p>Cross-server copy
$vssh export --output backup.jsonExport config
$vssh import backup.jsonImport config

/ Quick Install

Ready in 30 Seconds

Single-binary distribution. No runtime dependencies. Pick your preferred method and get started.

Build from Source

git clone https://github.com/motoryang/velo-ssh.git
cd velo-ssh
# Auto-injects version from VERSION file
chmod +x scripts/install.sh && ./scripts/install.sh

Go Install

go install github.com/motoryang/velo-ssh@latest

Download Release Binary

# Download from GitHub Releases
curl -LO https://github.com/motoryang/velo-ssh/releases/latest/download/vssh_linux_amd64.tar.gz
tar xzf vssh_linux_amd64.tar.gz
sudo mv vssh /usr/local/bin/

/ Keybindings

Keyboard Is Your Mouse

A carefully designed keybinding system that balances intuitive flow for newcomers and Vim muscle memory for power users.

Key Action Context
j/k or ↑/↓Move cursorServer list
/Search / filter serversServer list
EnterConnect via SSHServer list
fOpen file managerServer list
SOpen settingsServer list
a / e / c / dAdd/Edit/Clone/Delete serverServer list
TabSwitch left/right paneFile manager
SpaceSelect / deselect fileFile manager
u / dUpload / DownloadFile manager
y / vCopy / PasteFile manager
=Checksum & text diffFile manager
tOpen task centerFile manager
p / rPause / Resume transferTask center
:vssh filesSwitch to file managerSSH Shell
:vssh backReturn to server listSSH Shell
:vssh quitDisconnect & exitSSH Shell

/ Tech Stack

Pure Go, Ecosystem-Driven

Built on the Charmbracelet ecosystem and Go standard library for a buttery terminal experience.

Go 1.26+ Bubbletea Bubbles Lipgloss Cobra go-keyring pkg/sftp golang.org/x/crypto
GitHub Releases README 中文文档 MIT License
